title: SQL Injection Attack on Production WAF

attackChain.description: Automated scanner (sqlmap) probed /search endpoint with fingerprinting payloads.
Attacker crafted UNION-based SQL injection payload targeting MySQL backend.
Payload delivered via HTTP GET parameter: ?id=1' UNION SELECT NULL,user(),database()--
WAF detected and blocked the SQLi attempt. Rule: sqli-union-select triggered.
All 47 malicious requests blocked by WAF. No data exfiltration occurred.

note: EXAMPLE — fixture data for demo mode.
